Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

Maybe I'm missing something, but doesn't conf-sanity on master currently skip the disk2_10 and disk 2_12 images for test 32b. If they are being skipped, that should be fixed as part of this patch is not being tested properly.

parents.subject: LU-15506 tests: improve conf-sanity test_32 messages

commit.subject: LU-15506 tests: fix sha1sum error for disk images with multiple mdts
commit.message:
LU-15506 tests: fix sha1sum error for disk images with multiple mdts

For new disk2_10-ldiskfs and disk2_12-ldiskfs images,
check remote_dir for sha1sum test. For dne image, check
striped_dir.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=conf-sanity env=ONLY=32

Change-Id: I9d3d80c016af5320545799a6f3ac34a31e6df168
Signed-off-by: Wei Liu <sarah@whamcloud.com>
